recipe.title: Fantastic fish pie
recipe.description: Fish pie is a family favourite, and this Jamie Oliver fish pie recipe is no exception. Packed with haddock or cod, baby spinach, and of course, boiled eggs.

ingredients.name: large handful of fresh flat-leaf parsley
haddock or cod fillet
ingredients.note: skin off, pin-boned, from sustainable sources

steps.descr: Peel and dice the potatoes into 2
steps.instructions: Peel and dice the potatoes into 2.5cm chunks, then put into boiling salted water and bring back to the boil for 2 minutes.

on_enter.say: Peel and dice the potatoes into 2.5cm chunks, then put into boiling salted water and bring back to the boil for 2 minutes.

steps.descr: Carefully add the eggs to the pan and cook for a further...
steps.instructions: Carefully add the eggs to the pan and cook for a further 8 minutes, or until hard-boiled, by which time the potatoes should also be cooked.

on_enter.say: Carefully add the eggs to the pan and cook for a further 8 minutes, or until hard-boiled, by which time the potatoes should also be cooked.

steps.descr: At the same time, steam the spinach in a colander above...
steps.instructions: At the same time, steam the spinach in a colander above the pan. This will only take a minute. When the spinach is done, remove from the colander and gently squeeze out any excess moisture.

on_enter.say: At the same time, steam the spinach in a colander above the pan. This will only take a minute. When the spinach is done, remove from the colander and gently squeeze out any excess moisture.

steps.descr: Drain the potatoes in the colander
steps.instructions: Drain the potatoes in the colander. Remove the eggs, cool under cold water, then peel and quarter them. Place to one side.

on_enter.say: Drain the potatoes in the colander. Remove the eggs, cool under cold water, then peel and quarter them. Place to one side.

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the onion, then peel, halve and...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the onion, then peel, halve and finely chop the carrot.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the onion, then peel, halve and finely chop the carrot.

steps.descr: In a separate pan, slowly fry the onion and carrot in a...
steps.instructions: In a separate pan, slowly fry the onion and carrot in a little oil for about 5 minutes, then add the double cream and bring just to the boil.

on_enter.say: In a separate pan, slowly fry the onion and carrot in a little oil for about 5 minutes, then add the double cream and bring just to the boil.

steps.descr: Remove from the heat and finely grate in 2 good handfuls...
steps.instructions: Remove from the heat and finely grate in 2 good handfuls of cheese, then squeeze in the lemon juice and stir through the mustard.

on_enter.say: Remove from the heat and finely grate in 2 good handfuls of cheese, then squeeze in the lemon juice and stir through the mustard.

steps.descr: Pick and finely chop the parsley and stir into the cream...
steps.instructions: Pick and finely chop the parsley and stir into the cream mixture.

on_enter.say: Pick and finely chop the parsley and stir into the cream mixture.

steps.descr: Slice the fish into strips then place in an earthenware...
steps.instructions: Slice the fish into strips then place in an earthenware dish with the spinach and eggs and mix together, pouring over the creamy vegetable sauce.

on_enter.say: Slice the fish into strips then place in an earthenware dish with the spinach and eggs and mix together, pouring over the creamy vegetable sauce.

steps.descr: The cooked potatoes should be drained and mashed – add a...
steps.instructions: The cooked potatoes should be drained and mashed – add a bit of oil, sea salt, black pepper and a touch of nutmeg (if using). Spread on top of the fish. Don’t bother piping it to make it look pretty – it’s a homely hearty thing.

on_enter.say: The cooked potatoes should be drained and mashed – add a bit of oil, sea salt, black pepper and a touch of nutmeg (if using). Spread on top of the fish. Don’t bother piping it to make it look pretty – it’s a homely hearty thing.

steps.descr: Place in the oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the...
steps.instructions: Place in the oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden.

on_enter.say: Place in the oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden.

steps.descr: Serve with some nice peas or greens, not forgetting your...
steps.instructions: Serve with some nice peas or greens, not forgetting your baked beans and tomato ketchup. Tacky but tasty, and that’s what I like.

on_enter.say: Serve with some nice peas or greens, not forgetting your baked beans and tomato ketchup. Tacky but tasty, and that’s what I like.
